\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5752 introduces Topological Quantum Storage Paper Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Phi_n = n\Phi_0 = n \times 2.07 \times 10^{-15} \text{ Wb} \end{equation}
